data.title: Vivenda Reschedules 2026 Financial Calendar to Align Group Reporting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Vivenda Group S.p.A. ( (IT:VVG) ).

Vivenda Group S.p.A., a Rome-based leader in OOH and DOOH advertising, leverages large-format installations and integrated restoration and real estate capabilities to fund building rehabilitation through advertising revenues. The company has begun exporting this zero-cost sponsored restoration model to the United Arab Emirates and Spain, broadening its international footprint.

Vivenda has revised its 2026 corporate events calendar, postponing the approval dates for its 2025 financial statements to late May and late June and scheduling half-year results for the end of September 2026. The shift is aimed at allowing sufficient time to collect and consolidate subsidiaries’ accounts in line with Italian civil code and consolidated reporting requirements, which may modestly delay disclosure but supports more accurate group-level financial reporting for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:VVG) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vivenda Group S.p.A. stock, see the IT:VVG Stock Forecast page.

More about Vivenda Group S.p.A.

Vivenda Group S.p.A., founded in Rome in 2006, is an advertising concessionaire specialising in Out Of Home and Digital Out of Home formats, with a focus on large-scale installations in high-visibility, landmark locations. The group operates across OOH advertising, architectural restoration via Vivenda Lavori, legal and financial advertising, and real estate redevelopment, centring its model on zero-cost sponsored restorations financed by ad revenues. In recent years it has expanded internationally with Vivenda GCC FZE in Dubai and Vivenda Adv Es in Barcelona to replicate this restoration-driven advertising model in the UAE and Spain.

Average Trading Volume: 38,921

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €5.09M

Learn more about VVG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Sranan Gold Regains Full Trading Clearance After Filing Delayed Financials
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Peak Minerals Ltd. ( (TSE:SRAN) ) just unveiled an update.

Sranan Gold Corp. has had its Management Cease Trade Order, imposed by the Alberta Securities Commission in January and applicable only to its CEO and CFO, revoked as of March 19, 2026. The order did not halt trading by other shareholders, and its removal signals that the company has addressed the compliance issue that triggered the restriction.

The company has now filed its audited annual financial statements, accompanying management’s discussion and analysis, executive certifications for the year ended September 30, 2025, and interim financials for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. These disclosures, now posted on SEDAR+, restore full financial reporting compliance and may reassure investors about the company’s governance and regulatory standing in the Canadian market.

Spark’s Take on SRAN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRAN is a Neutral.

TSE:SRAN’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges with no revenue and consistent losses. While technical analysis shows some positive signals, and recent corporate events suggest strategic initiatives, these factors are insufficient to overcome the financial difficulties and lack of valuation metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on SRAN stock, click here.

More about Peak Minerals Ltd.

Sranan Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring and developing gold property assets in Suriname. Its flagship Tapanahony Project spans 29,000 hectares in one of the country’s most prolific artisanal gold mining districts, and it has recently added the 18,468-hectare Lawatino Project along the Central Guiana Shear Zone in southeastern Suriname.

Average Trading Volume: 236,336

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$13.9M

See more data about SRAN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: GCP Infrastructure Continues Buyback, Lifts Treasury Holdings to Nearly 39m Shares
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) is now available.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 519,789 ordinary shares on 20 March 2026 at a volume-weighted average price of 74.42 pence per share through broker RBC Europe Limited. The transaction forms part of the company’s broader strategy to manage its capital structure and address the discount to net asset value at which the shares trade.

Following the latest buyback, GCP Infra has 884,797,669 ordinary shares in issue, of which 55,911,304 are held in treasury, leaving 828,886,365 voting shares outstanding for regulatory disclosure purposes. Since the programme began in December 2024, the company has moved 38,926,285 shares into treasury, a material reduction in its free float that may support earnings per share and provide potential value enhancement for remaining shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GCP) stock is a Buy with a £90.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP stock, see the GB:GCP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GCP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GCP is a Outperform.

The score is primarily driven by strong balance-sheet conservatism and improving cash generation, supported by constructive technical trend signals. Offsetting these positives are inconsistent/declining revenue trends and a demanding P/E despite an attractive dividend yield, with corporate actions (dividend stability and buybacks) providing additional support.

To see Spark’s full report on GCP stock, click here.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited is a UK-listed investment company focused on infrastructure debt. It primarily invests in UK infrastructure projects by providing long-term, asset-backed loans, offering investors exposure to stable, income-generating assets in sectors such as renewable energy, social infrastructure and regulated utilities.

Average Trading Volume: 1,911,627

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For an in-depth examination of GCP stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ) has issued an announcement.

BH Macro Limited has repurchased 50,338 sterling ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange at a weighted average price of £4.23 and intends to hold these shares in treasury. Following this transaction, the company reports 306,142,450 sterling shares and 24,156,302 U.S. dollar shares in issue, excluding treasury, resulting in total voting rights of 468,708,827.

The move modestly reduces the company’s free float while potentially enhancing net asset value per share for remaining shareholders. By continuing to use share buybacks and treasury holdings as capital management tools, BH Macro signals active oversight of its capital structure and responsiveness to market pricing of its listed shares.

TietoEVRY, a global provider of mission‑critical software and digital engineering services across healthcare, banking, industrial and consulting segments, operates with about 14,000 specialists in vertical software, cloud, AI and design, and reports annual revenue of approximately EUR 2 billion. data.title: National Bankshares Announces Resignation of Chief Lending Officer
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

National Bankshares ( (NKSH) ) just unveiled an update.

National Bankshares, Inc. announced that on March 16, 2026, Executive Vice President and Chief Lending Officer Paul M. Mylum informed the company and its subsidiary, The National Bank of Blacksburg, of his decision to resign, effective May 15, 2026. His departure, driven by a family relocation, will require the bank to adjust leadership in its lending operations as he moves to become president of The Bank of Charlotte County in Phenix, Virginia.

The transition marks a significant change in senior management for National Bankshares, particularly in the lending function that is central to its community banking model. Stakeholders may watch closely how the company manages this leadership change and maintains continuity in its credit and lending strategy following Mylum’s exit in mid-May 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (NKSH) stock is a Buy with a $41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on National Bankshares stock, see the NKSH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NKSH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NKSH is a Outperform.

Overall score reflects a strong financial foundation (low leverage and solid cash flow) tempered by weaker TTM revenue/profitability versus prior highs. Technicals are constructive with the stock trading above key moving averages, while valuation is reasonable with a solid dividend yield. Recent corporate updates are favorable, highlighting strategic execution and operational upgrades.

To see Spark’s full report on NKSH stock, click here.

More about National Bankshares

National Bankshares, Inc., through its wholly owned subsidiary The National Bank of Blacksburg, operates as a community banking institution. The company focuses on providing lending and other banking services to its regional customer base, positioning itself as a locally oriented lender within its markets.

Average Trading Volume: 16,248

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $232.4M

data.title: MedPal AI Raises £527,000 in Discounted Placing and Plans Retail Offer
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from MedPal AI Plc ( (GB:MPAL) ).

MedPal AI Plc has conditionally raised about £527,000 through a placing of 21,080,000 new shares at 2.5 pence each, representing a 13% discount to the prior closing price. The company is also launching a separate WRAP retail offer of new ordinary shares, which will proceed only if the placing completes.

The combined fundraising is intended to bolster working capital for MedPal AI’s pharmacy operations so it can hold more inventory and a broader product range to meet rising customer demand. Funds will also support a digital marketing campaign for MedPal.clinic, with the enlarged share capital post-admission set at 476,234,640 shares, affecting voting rights and disclosure thresholds for existing and prospective shareholders.

More about MedPal AI Plc

MedPal AI Plc is a UK-based digital health and artificial intelligence company listed on AIM and Frankfurt, focusing on online clinical services via MedPal.clinic and associated pharmacy operations. The business targets growing demand for digitally delivered healthcare and medications, requiring investment in stock levels and customer acquisition to expand its presence in the digital health market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,250,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Learn more about MPAL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Alamos Gold ( (TSE:AGI) ) has issued an announcement.

Alamos Gold has filed a technical report for the Expansion Study of its Island Gold District operation in Ontario, prepared under National Instrument 43-101 standards for mineral project disclosure. The report, which underpins previously released disclosure on the expansion, is now accessible via the company’s website and Canadian and U.S. securities filing platforms, reinforcing transparency around the project’s development plans.

By formalizing the Island Gold District Expansion Study in a compliant technical report, Alamos strengthens the technical and regulatory foundation of its growth pipeline. This step underscores the importance of Island Gold within the company’s portfolio and provides investors and other stakeholders with detailed, standardized information on the project’s potential and progression.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AGI) stock is a Buy with a C$62.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alamos Gold stock, see the TSE:AGI Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (rapid recent profit growth, conservative leverage, and solid operating cash flow) and a positive technical trend (price above key moving averages with positive MACD). The latest earnings call adds support via higher production and lower-cost guidance, while valuation is the main constraint given the ~20x P/E and low dividend yield, alongside execution risk from recent operational issues and heavy near-term capital spending.

To see Spark’s full report on AGI stock, click here.

More about Alamos Gold

Alamos Gold Inc. is a Canadian-based intermediate gold producer operating three mines across North America.
